title: Minimality
description: Clean hotbar, Clear inventory, and better hearts.
body:
Minimality is a clean and simple resource pack that improves Minecraft’s user interface by reducing visual clutter and making everything easier to see.

This pack focuses on a minimal design while keeping the vanilla feel.

Includes:

* Clean hotbar
* Clean Inventory

The goal of this pack is to make the game look smoother and less distracting, while still feeling like normal Minecraft.

Works with vanilla Minecraft. No mods required.

---

Installation:

1. Open your `.minecraft` folder (type `%appdata%` in the Windows search bar).
2. Go to the `resourcepacks` folder.
3. Place the pack inside.
4. Enable it in the Resource Packs menu in Minecraft.

---

Simple. Clean. Minimal. You can check out some of my other projects with these links:
